basics.label: Software Developer
basics.quote: Be the change you want to see in the world.
basics.name: Raúl Correia
basics.summary: **Imaginary full-stack software developer with 6+ years industry experience** specializing in cloud-driven web applications and middleware. A native of southern CA, Jane enjoys hiking, mystery novels, and the company of Rufus, her two year old beagle.

work.summary: Backend developer and Software Architect for [**Ostate**](https://omrt.tech/ostate/), a parametric tool to generate architectural buildings.
highlights: Re-engineered Ostate to capture new business requirements.

work.summary: Developer on Web team, researching and developing Uniface solutions to modern standards.
highlights: Development of a custom VSCode extension for ProcScript

work.summary: Developer on MES Product, developing main CMF product.
highlights: Successfully migrated the main CMF Product from legacy code base to next gen implementation.
Re-engineered a module for highly regulated fields like medical devices or weighing tools.

work.summary: Developer of an SDK in .NET to interact with payment terminals.
highlights: Successfully migrated the main CMF Product from legacy code base to next gen implementation.
Re-engineered a module for highly regulated fields like medical devices or weighing tools.
